name: Fish Courtbouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized Dutch oven, heat the salad oil over medium heat.
2. Add alternating layers of fish, onions, garlic, lemon slices, and tomato sauce. Season with salt (both black and red) and pepper.
3. Do not add water. Cover and simmer for 1 hour. A small amount of water may be added toward the end of cooking if more gravy is desired.
4. Serve over mounds of rice. Try a tossed green salad and French bread.
---
